ZSNAP_F01G_GLACCOUNTLINEITEM.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN."SourceLedger" as SOURCELEDGER,
	MAIN."CompanyCode" as COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN."FiscalYear" as FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN."AccountingDocument" as ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN."LedgerGLLineItem" as LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	ZSNAP_F01G_COCODELEDGERSOURCELEDGER.LEDGER,
	MAIN."ChartOfAccounts" as CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN."ControllingArea" as CONTROLLINGAREA,
	MAIN."GLAccount" as GLACCOUNT,
	MAIN."CostCenter" as COSTCENTER,
	MAIN."ProfitCenter" as PROFITCENTER,
	MAIN."FunctionalArea" as FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN."BusinessArea" as BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN."DebitCreditCode" as DEBITCREDITCODE,
	
	/*@Semantics.fiscal.period: true*/
	MAIN."FiscalPeriod" as FISCALPERIOD,
	
	/*@Semantics.fiscal.yearVariant: true*/
	MAIN."FiscalYearVariant" as FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	
	/*@Semantics.fiscal.yearPeriod: true*/
	MAIN."FiscalYearPeriod" as FISCALYEARPERIOD,
	MAIN."AccountingDocumentType" as ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN."AccountingDocumentItem" as ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	MAIN."AccountingDocumentCategory" as ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN."Supplier" as SUPPLIER,
	MAIN."FinancialAccountType" as FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	MAIN."SpecialGLCode" as SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN."ClearingDate" as CLEARINGDATE,
	
	/*@Analytics.internalName: #LOCAL*/
	MAIN."ClearingJournalEntryFiscalYear" as CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	
	/*@Analytics.internalName: #LOCAL*/
	MAIN."ClearingJournalEntry" as CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	
	/*@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
	@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN."AmountInTransactionCurrency" as AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	MAIN."TransactionCurrency" as TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
	@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	MAIN."AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency" as AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	MAIN."CompanyCodeCurrency" as COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
	@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	MAIN."AmountInGlobalCurrency" as AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
	MAIN."GlobalCurrency" as GLOBALCURRENCY
from I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01G_COCODELEDGERSOURCELEDGER on MAIN."SourceLedger" = ZSNAP_F01G_COCODELEDGERSOURCELEDGER.SOURCELEDGER and MAIN."CompanyCode" = ZSNAP_F01G_COCODELEDGERSOURCELEDGER.COMPANYCODE;
ZSNAP_F01G_GLACCOUNTLINEITEM.@EndUserText.label: General Ledger Account Line Item

ZSNAP_F01S_050.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: Base extraction layer for AP analysis. Isolates vendor line items from the universal journal, applies signage to amounts, and enriches with operational document details including payment terms, clearing info, and discount multipliers.
ZSNAP_F01S_050.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.purpos: Selects AP journal items from I_JournalEntryItem, filters for vendor accounts, applies signage
ZSNAP_F01S_050.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN.COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."DocumentItemText" as DOCUMENTITEMTEXT,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN.CONTROLLINGAREA,
	MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCE,
	MAIN.INVOICEITEMREFERENCE,
	MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCEFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.DEBITCREDITCODE,
	MAIN.CLEARINGDATE,
	MAIN.POSTINGDATE,
	MAIN.DOCUMENTDATE,
	_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."DueCalculationBaseDate" as DUECALCULATIONBASEDATE,
	_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount1Days" as CASHDISCOUNT1DAYS,
	CONCAT (cast (cast (COALESCE (_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount1Percent", cast (0 as DECIMAL(5,3))) as DECIMAL(5,2)) as NVARCHAR(20)), '%') as CASHDISCOUNT1PERCENT,
	ROUND (_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount1Percent" / 100, 2) as CASHDISCOUNT1MULTIPLIER,
	case
		when _OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount1Percent" <> 0 then 'X'
	end as DISCOUNTISAVAILABLE,
	case
		when _OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount1Percent" <> 0 then TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (TO_DATE (_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."DueCalculationBaseDate", 'YYYYMMDD'), cast (_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount1Days" as INTEGER)), 'YYYYMMDD')
		else _OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."NetDueDate"
	end as CASHDISCOUNT1DATE,
	_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount2Days" as CASHDISCOUNT2DAYS,
	CONCAT (cast (cast (COALESCE (_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount2Percent", cast (0 as DECIMAL(5,3))) as DECIMAL(5,2)) as NVARCHAR(20)), '%') as CASHDISCOUNT2PERCENT,
	ROUND (_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount2Percent" / 100, 2) as CASHDISCOUNT2MULTIPLIER,
	case
		when _OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount2Percent" <> 0 then TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (TO_DATE (_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."DueCalculationBaseDate", 'YYYYMMDD'), cast (_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CashDiscount2Days" as INTEGER)), 'YYYYMMDD')
		else _OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."NetDueDate"
	end as CASHDISCOUNT2DATE,
	_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."PaymentBlockingReason" as PAYMENTBLOCKINGREASON,
	_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."PaymentMethod" as PAYMENTMETHOD,
	_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."IsUsedInPaymentTransaction" as ISUSEDINPAYMENTTRANSACTION,
	_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."TreasuryContractType" as TREASURYCONTRACTTYPE,
	MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	MAIN.SUPPLIER,
	MAIN.FOLLOWONDOCUMENTTYPE as INVOICEREFERENCETYPE,
	MAIN.NETDUEDATE,
	case
		when MAIN.FOLLOWONDOCUMENTTYPE = '' or MAIN.FOLLOWONDOCUMENTTYPE = 'V' or MAIN.FOLLOWONDOCUMENTTYPE = 'P' or (MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCE = '' and MAIN.INVOICEITEMREFERENCE = '000' and MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCEFISCALYEAR = '0000') then 'X'
		else cast ('' as NVARCHAR(1))
	end as USEREFERENCEDINVOICEDATES,
	MAIN.SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN.GLACCOUNT,
	MAIN.COSTCENTER,
	MAIN.PROFITCENTER,
	MAIN.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN.BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN.PARTNERCOMPANY,
	MAIN.SEGMENT,
	case MAIN.PURCHASINGDOCUMENT
		when '' then COALESCE (_OFFSETPURCHASEORDER.PURCHASINGDOCUMENT, cast ('' as NVARCHAR(1)))
		else MAIN.PURCHASINGDOCUMENT
	end as PURCHASINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.ASSIGNMENTREFERENCE,
	_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."PaymentTerms" as PAYMENTTERMS,
	MAIN.POSTINGKEY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	case :P_SIGNAGE
		when 'A' then MAIN.AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY
		else -MAIN.AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY
	end as AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	MAIN.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	case :P_SIGNAGE
		when 'A' then MAIN.AMOUNTINBALANCETRANSACCRCY
		else -MAIN.AMOUNTINBALANCETRANSACCRCY
	end as AMOUNTINBALTC,
	MAIN.BALANCETRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	case :P_SIGNAGE
		when 'A' then MAIN.AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY
		else -MAIN.AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY
	end as AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	case :P_SIGNAGE
		when 'A' then MAIN.AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY
		else -MAIN.AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY
	end as AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
	MAIN.GLOBALCURRENCY
from ZSNAP_F01G_JOURNALENTRYITEM as MAIN
left outer join I_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM as _OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM on MAIN.COMPANYCODE = _OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."CompanyCode" and MAIN.FISCALYEAR = _OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."FiscalYear" and MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT = _OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."AccountingDocument" and MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM = _OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM."AccountingDocumentItem"
left outer join ZSNAP_F01G_OFFSETPURCHASEORDERCDS as _OFFSETPURCHASEORDER on MAIN.COMPANYCODE = _OFFSETPURCHASEORDER.COMPANYCODE and MAIN.FISCALYEAR = _OFFSETPURCHASEORDER.FISCALYEAR and MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT = _OFFSETPURCHASEORDER.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT
where MAIN.SOURCELEDGER = '0L'
	and MAIN.LEDGER = '0L'
	and MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE = 'K'
	and MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY = ''
	and MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM <> '000'
	and MAIN.NETDUEDATE <> '00000000'
	and MAIN.NETDUEDATE is not null
	and MAIN.POSTINGDATE <= TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD');
ZSNAP_F01S_050.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F01: Isolate AP Journal Items

ZSNAP_F01G_P_RECONACCOUNT.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN.RECONCILIATIONACCOUNT,
	MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.RECONACCOUNTTYPE,
	_DATA.ISBALANCESHEETACCOUNT,
	_DATA.GLACCOUNTGROUP,
	_DATA.CORPORATEGROUPCHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	_DATA.CORPORATEGROUPACCOUNT,
	_DATA.PROFITLOSSACCOUNTTYPE,
	_DATA.SAMPLEGLACCOUNT,
	_DATA.ACCOUNTISMARKEDFORDELETION,
	_DATA.ACCOUNTISBLOCKEDFORCREATION,
	_DATA.ACCOUNTISBLOCKEDFORPOSTING,
	_DATA.ACCOUNTISBLOCKEDFORPLANNING,
	_DATA.PARTNERCOMPANY,
	_DATA.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	TO_VARCHAR (_DATA.CREATIONDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as CREATIONDATE,
	_DATA.CREATEDBYUSER,
	_DATA.LASTCHANGEDATETIME,
	_DATA.GLACCOUNTTYPE,
	_DATA.GLACCOUNTSUBTYPE,
	_DATA.GLACCOUNTEXTERNAL,
	_DATA.BANKRECONCILIATIONACCOUNT
from ZSNAP_F01G_P_RECONACCOUNTBASIS as MAIN
left outer join ZSNAP_F01G_GLACCOUNTINCHARTOFACCOUNTS as _DATA on MAIN.RECONCILIATIONACCOUNT = _DATA.GLACCOUNT and MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS = _DATA.CHARTOFACCOUNTS;
ZSNAP_F01G_P_RECONACCOUNT.@EndUserText.label: P: Reconciliation Account

ZSNAP_F01G_PARAMETERMATERIALIZATION.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: SNAP: Net Due Interval by Date
ZSNAP_F01G_PARAMETERMATERIALIZATION.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as KEYDATE,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS as NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS,
	TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (:P_KEYDATE, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS), 'YYYYMMDD') as INTERVAL1PLUSDATE,
	TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (:P_KEYDATE, -:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS), 'YYYYMMDD') as INTERVAL1MINUSDATE,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS as NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS,
	TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (:P_KEYDATE, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS), 'YYYYMMDD') as INTERVAL2PLUSDATE,
	TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (:P_KEYDATE, -:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS), 'YYYYMMDD') as INTERVAL2MINUSDATE,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS as NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS,
	TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (:P_KEYDATE, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS), 'YYYYMMDD') as INTERVAL3PLUSDATE,
	TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (:P_KEYDATE, -:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS), 'YYYYMMDD') as INTERVAL3MINUSDATE,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS as NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS,
	TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (:P_KEYDATE, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS), 'YYYYMMDD') as INTERVAL4PLUSDATE,
	TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (:P_KEYDATE, -:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS), 'YYYYMMDD') as INTERVAL4MINUSDATE
from ZSNAP_F01G_SINGLEROW as MAIN;
ZSNAP_F01G_PARAMETERMATERIALIZATION.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: Net Due Interval by Date
